title: Brittonastrum wrightii
taxonomy: Brittonastrum wrightii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is a shrub that produces small white or pink flowers. It is also known as Wright's Brittonastrum or Wright's Verbena. Brittonastrum wrightii is a member of the genus Brittonastrum, which is a group of flowering plants with similar characteristics.
